# Ajay Bhattacharyya - Portfolio

## About Me
I am a full-stack software engineer based in Rochester, New York. I specialize in API development with the .NET Framework and the Azure Cloud Platform. I am currently available for full time roles and open-source collaboration.

## Key Links
* Home Page: [https://ajaybhattacharyya.com](https://ajaybhattacharyya.com)
* Skills & Experience: [https://ajaybhattacharyya.com/about](https://ajaybhattacharyya.com/about)
* Project Showcase: [https://ajaybhattacharyya.com/projects](https://ajaybhattacharyya.com/projects)
* Contact Info: [https://ajaybhattacharyya.com/contact](https://ajaybhattacharyya.com/contact)

## Core Skills
* Programming Languages: C#, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Golang
* Frameworks: .NET, Flask, FastAPI, ExpressJS, React, Angular
* Databases: MongoDB, Cosmos, Firestore, MySQL
* Cloud Platforms: Azure, GCP, AWS

## Hiring / collaboration
If you are looking to hire a software engineer or collaborate on a project, please reach out via Email at ajay.bhattacharyya.16@gmail.com.
